description: Water system test vectors — verifies water plane position, wave displacement, shore foam, swimming triggers, and shore fade. The water plane is a 300x300m plane at WATER_LEVEL with 13 base sine waves plus 6 storm-chop waves.

vectors.description: Water plane y-position must equal CONFIG.WATER_LEVEL. The plane follows the player on XZ, snapped to grid step 300/128.

expected.note: Grid snap = 300/128 = 2.34375m. Prevents wave pattern sliding when the plane repositions.

vectors.description: Wave displacement at position (0,0) time=0: deterministic sum of 13 base sine waves. Each wave = amplitude * sin(dot(pos.xz, direction) + time * speed). At pos=(0,0) t=0, dot product is 0 for all waves, so sin(0)=0 for all.

expected.calculation: All 13 waves: amplitude * sin(0 + 0) = 0. Storm-chop waves also zero (rainIntensity=0). Total displacement = 0.
expected.note: At origin with time=0, every wave's phase is sin(0)=0. This is a deterministic zero-displacement test point.

vectors.description: Wave displacement at a non-trivial point: position (10, 5) time=1.0 with no rain. Sum of 13 base sine waves with known directions, speeds, and amplitudes.

expected.note: Max possible displacement = sum of all 13 amplitudes = 0.207m (when all waves align). Actual displacement is the sum of each wave at the given position/time. The exact value can be computed from the formula.

vectors.description: Wave amplitude range: uWaveAmplitude uniform scales all wave heights. Weather drives this from 1.0 (sunny) to 1.8 (rainy) via lerp3.

expected.note: At sunny (0), amplitude is baseline 1.0. At cloudy (1), slight increase to 1.15. At rainy (2), full storm waves at 1.8x.

vectors.description: Shore foam threshold: foam strips are generated where terrain height crosses WATER_LEVEL (-3.5m). The foam region spans from WATER_LEVEL - FOAM_WATER_WIDTH to approximately WATER_LEVEL + FOAM_SHORE_WIDTH in terrain space.

expected.terrainCrossingRange: Foam appears wherever terrain crosses WATER_LEVEL. Shore side follows terrain surface; water side sits at WATER_LEVEL + 0.07m.
expected.note: Foam uses marching squares on a 1.5m (FOAM_GRID_SPACING) grid. It does NOT use the range [-3.7, -3.35] directly; rather, it detects where terrain transitions across the water level. The water-side vertices sit at WATER_LEVEL + 0.07m to avoid z-fighting.

vectors.description: Shore fade: water transparency ramps from opaque to transparent between -0.2m and +0.15m above terrain height. Uses heightmap texture lookup.

expected.fullyOpaque: water height is 0.2m+ above terrain (deep water)
expected.fullyTransparent: water height is 0.15m below terrain (above waterline/shore)
expected.note: The shore fade uses a 128x128 DataTexture encoding terrain heights across the water plane extent. Updated in 8-frame batches (16 rows per frame).

vectors.description: Swimming trigger: swimming activates when water depth exceeds SWIM_DEPTH_THRESHOLD (1.2m). Water depth = waterSurface - terrainHeight.

expected.note: When terrainHeight < WATER_LEVEL - SWIM_DEPTH_THRESHOLD (i.e. < -4.7m), swimming triggers. Player eyes float 0.45m above water surface with gentle 0.6Hz bob.

vectors.description: Storm-chop waves: 6 additional waves activated by rainIntensity (0-1). These add turbulence during storms.

expected.totalMaxDisplacement: base(0.207) * uWaveAmplitude(1.8) + storm(0.056) = ~0.429m at max storm
expected.note: Storm-chop waves have higher speeds (2.5-4.1) for choppy appearance. Amplitudes multiplied by rainIntensity which is max(0, weatherIntensity - 1).
